## reference · plain english sentence length reading age measurable rules
* Use short sentences: aim for 20 words or less for users with a good reading age.
* Check reading age: use a tool to ensure content is readable for users with a reading age of 9-11 (Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level 9-11).
* Avoid complex language: use simple, clear language to help users understand content.
* Test content: use tools to analyze content and make improvements.

Sources: https://www.gov.uk/guidance/content-design/writing-for-gov-uk
